title: Upon Ben Jonson.
content:
Here lies Jonson with the rest
    Of the poets: but the best.
    Reader, would'st thou more have known?
    Ask his story, not this stone.
    That will speak what this can't tell
    Of his glory. So farewell.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Upon Ben Jonson."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
